corbett.title: Arrival and Welcome Dinner
corbett.description: - Morning: - Arrive at Pantnagar Airport or Kathgodam Railway Station, where transportation arranged by your wedding planner will pick you up. - Transfer to your selected resort in Jim Corbett National Park. - Afternoon: - Check-in and freshen up at the resort. - Rest and relax, or explore the resort's amenities. - Evening: - Welcome dinner at the resort or an outdoor location. - Enjoy a bonfire, live music, or other entertainment. - Briefing by the wedding planner regarding the wedding events.

corbett.title: Mehndi and Sangeet Ceremony
corbett.description: - Morning: - Breakfast at the resort. - Spa and relaxation time for the bride and groom. - Afternoon: - Mehndi and henna application ceremony for the bride. - Sangeet practice and preparations for the evening. - Evening: - Sangeet ceremony with music, dance, and dinner. - Guests can enjoy traditional and Bollywood dance performances.

corbett.title: Wedding Day
corbett.description: - Morning: - Breakfast at the resort. - Bridal makeup and getting ready. - Groom's preparations and dressing. - Afternoon: - Wedding ceremony at a scenic location within the resort or in the Corbett National Park. - Lunch served at the venue. - Evening: - Cocktail reception or post-wedding dinner at the resort. - Fireworks or other entertainment options. - Cake cutting and toasts.

corbett.title: Departure
corbett.description: - Morning: - Farewell brunch at the resort. - Guests can enjoy some leisure time or opt for optional activities like a jungle safari or nature walk. - Afternoon: - Check-out from the resort. - Transportation provided for guests to Pantnagar Airport or Kathgodam Railway Station for departures.

triyuginarayan-wedding.title: Arrival and Welcome Dinner
triyuginarayan-wedding.description: Morning: - Arrive at Dehradun's Jolly Grant Airport or Haridwar Railway Station. - Greeted by wedding organizers and transported to your chosen accommodation in the nearby town of Guptkashi or Kedarnath. Afternoon: - Check-in and freshen up. - Welcome lunch at the hotel or a local restaurant. Evening: - Welcome dinner at the hotel or a special outdoor venue. - Briefing with the wedding planner to discuss the wedding schedule. - Rest and relax to prepare for the big day.

triyuginarayan-wedding.title: Wedding Day
triyuginarayan-wedding.description: Morning: - Early morning tea and snacks. - Get ready for the wedding ceremony. - Depart for Triyuginarayan Temple, which is about 5-10 km from your accommodation. - The wedding ceremony at the ancient Triyuginarayan Temple. The priest will perform the sacred rituals. - Traditional Indian wedding lunch (or brunch) for the guests. Afternoon: - Return to the accommodation. - Relax and freshen up. Evening: - Reception and dinner party at a scenic location. - Music, dance, and celebrations continue late into the night.

triyuginarayan-wedding.title: Post-Wedding Celebrations
triyuginarayan-wedding.description: Morning: - Leisurely breakfast at the hotel. - Option for couples' photoshoot in and around the beautiful Himalayan landscape. - Guests can explore the local area or opt for a trekking or sightseeing tour. Afternoon: - Lunch at the hotel or packed lunches for guests on tours. - Traditional Mehendi and Haldi ceremonies for the bride. Evening: - Sangeet night with performances by friends and family. - Dinner with live music and dancing.

triyuginarayan-wedding.title: Departure
triyuginarayan-wedding.description: Morning: - Farewell breakfast at the hotel. - Check-out and departure for Dehradun or Haridwar. Afternoon: - Drop-off at the airport or railway station for onward journeys.

udaipur.title: Arrival in Udaipur
udaipur.description: - Morning: - Arrive at Maharana Pratap Airport or Udaipur Railway Station. - Meet and greet by the wedding organizers and transfer to your chosen hotel or resort. - Afternoon: - Check-in and freshen up at the hotel. - Enjoy a relaxing afternoon by the hotel pool or explore the nearby surroundings. - Evening: - Welcome dinner at the hotel or a nearby restaurant, where you can meet and greet with other wedding guests.

udaipur.title: Wedding Ceremony
udaipur.description: - Morning: - Breakfast at the hotel. - Get ready for the big day! Wedding preparations, including hair, makeup, and traditional attire. - Afternoon: - Proceed to the wedding venue. - Exchange vows and celebrate the union of the bride and groom. - Evening: - Cocktail hour and reception dinner with live music and dance performances. - Capture memorable moments with photography and videography.

udaipur.title: Explore Udaipur
udaipur.description: - Morning: - Breakfast at the hotel. - Visit the famous City Palace, a stunning blend of Rajasthani and Mughal architecture. - Afternoon: - Explore Jagdish Temple, an important Hindu temple in Udaipur. - Enjoy a boat ride on Lake Pichola, offering breathtaking views of the City Palace and Jag Mandir. - Evening: - Attend a cultural performance showcasing traditional Rajasthani dance and music. - Dinner at a rooftop restaurant with a panoramic view of the city.

udaipur.title: Departure
udaipur.description: - Morning: - Leisurely breakfast at the hotel. - Free time for shopping, last-minute sightseeing, or relaxation. - Afternoon: - Check-out from the hotel and complete any pending formalities. - Transfer to the airport or railway station for your onward journey.

kerala.title: Arrival in Kerala
kerala.description: Morning: - Arrive at the nearest airport (Cochin International Airport or Trivandrum International Airport). - Warm welcome by traditional Kerala dancers and a floral garland. Afternoon: - Transfer to your chosen wedding venue or resort. - Check-in and freshen up. - Lunch at the resort. - Relax and prepare for the evening. Evening: - Welcome dinner for the guests at the resort with a traditional Kerala feast. - Cultural performances showcasing Kerala's dance and music forms (Kathakali, Mohiniyattam, classical music, etc.). - Welcome speeches and introductions.

kerala.title: Wedding Ceremony
kerala.description: Morning: - Breakfast at the resort. - Bride and groom preparations and traditional bridal makeup for the bride. - Guests enjoy the resort amenities or take part in pre-wedding activities like Mehndi. Afternoon: - Lunch at the resort. - Guests can continue with pre-wedding rituals and preparations. Evening: - Wedding ceremony in a picturesque garden or beach setting. - Traditional Kerala wedding rituals with a priest. - Reception with cocktails and appetizers. - Wedding dinner with a mix of Kerala and international cuisine. - Music, dance, and fireworks to celebrate the union.

kerala.title: Post-Wedding Celebrations
kerala.description: Morning: - Leisurely breakfast at the resort. - Guests can explore the surrounding area, enjoy spa treatments, or simply relax. Afternoon: - Lunch at the resort. - Optional activities such as boat rides on the backwaters, sightseeing tours to nearby attractions like Fort Kochi or Alleppey, or a tea plantation visit in Munnar. Evening: - Reception party with a Western-style buffet and dance floor. - Cutting of the wedding cake. - Games, toasts, and speeches.

kerala.title: Farewell
kerala.description: Morning: - Breakfast at the resort. - Check-out for departing guests. - Distribution of thank-you gifts and farewell souvenirs. Afternoon: - For guests staying on, you can plan optional activities like a farewell lunch or a relaxed day at the resort.

goa-wedding.title: Arrival in Goa
goa-wedding.description: - Morning: - Arrive at Goa's Dabolim Airport (GOI) or the nearest train station. - Transfer to your chosen hotel or resort for check-in. - Afternoon: - Relax and freshen up after your journey. - Evening: - Welcome dinner or cocktail party at the hotel's venue or beachfront location. - Enjoy some local Goan cuisine and cocktails. - Welcome speeches and introductions.

goa-wedding.title: Wedding Ceremony
goa-wedding.description: - Morning: - Breakfast at the hotel. - Relax by the pool or at the beach. - Afternoon: - Hair and makeup appointments for the bride and bridal party. - Groom and groomsmen prepare for the ceremony. - Late Afternoon: - Wedding ceremony at a beautiful beachside or garden location. - Exchange of vows and rings. - Evening: - Cocktail hour with canapés. - Sunset photo session for the newlyweds. - Grand wedding reception with a lavish dinner and dancing.

goa-wedding.title: Beach Party and Leisure
goa-wedding.description: - Morning: - Late breakfast or brunch at the hotel. - Optional water sports or beach activities. - Afternoon: - Explore Goa's attractions or relax by the pool. - Spa and wellness treatments for the couple or guests. - Evening: - Beachside barbecue or seafood feast with live music and bonfire. - Fun games and activities for guests. - Release of sky lanterns or fireworks.

goa-wedding.title: Farewell and Departure
goa-wedding.description: - Morning: - Leisurely breakfast at the hotel. - Check-out and settle any outstanding bills. - Guests may have free time for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. - Afternoon: - Transfer to the airport or train station for departure. - Bid farewell to your guests and thank them for attending. - Evening: - Arrive back at your home destination.

manali.title: Arrival in Manali
manali.description: - Morning: Arrive at Kullu Manali Airport or Bhuntar Airport and transfer to your selected hotel or resort. - Afternoon: Check-in and freshen up. Enjoy lunch at the hotel. - Evening: Explore the local market in Manali for some shopping or relax at the hotel. - Night: Welcome dinner at the hotel or a local restaurant with traditional Himachali cuisine.

manali.title: Wedding Ceremony
manali.description: - Morning: Have a leisurely breakfast at the hotel. - Late Morning: Prepare for the wedding ceremony. Bride and groom may have their preparations in separate rooms. - Afternoon: The wedding ceremony takes place at a picturesque location, such as a riverside or garden, with traditional rituals. - Evening: Post-wedding ceremonies and celebrations, followed by a grand wedding dinner and dance.

manali.title: Manali Sightseeing
manali.description: - Morning: Breakfast at the hotel. - Late Morning: Visit local attractions in Manali: - **Hadimba Devi Temple:** A beautiful wooden temple amidst lush deodar forests. - **Museum of Himachal Culture & Folk Art:** Explore Himachali culture and art. - Afternoon: Lunch at a local restaurant. - Late Afternoon: Explore Manu Temple and stroll through Mall Road for shopping and souvenirs. - Evening: Return to the hotel to freshen up. - Night: Enjoy a casual get-together or cocktail party with friends and family.

manali.title: Departure
manali.description: - Morning: Check-out from the hotel. - Afternoon: If time permits, you can visit Solang Valley for adventure activities like paragliding, ziplining, or simply enjoy the scenic beauty. - Late Afternoon: Lunch at a local restaurant. - Evening: Depart for the airport for your onward journey or stay an extra night in Manali if desired.

rishikesh.title: Arrival in Rishikesh
rishikesh.description: - Morning: - Arrive at Jolly Grant Airport in Dehradun or the nearest railway station. - Transfer to your chosen accommodation in Rishikesh. - Check-in, freshen up, and relax. - Afternoon: - Welcome lunch or tea at the hotel or wedding venue. - Evening: - Sangeet ceremony or a welcome dinner at the wedding venue or a picturesque riverside location. - Traditional Indian music and dance performances.

rishikesh.title: Wedding Day
rishikesh.description: - Morning: - Breakfast at the hotel. - Mehendi ceremony for the bride and her close family and friends. - Afternoon: - Lunch at the hotel or venue. - Groom's procession or "Baraat" along the scenic streets of Rishikesh, accompanied by traditional music and dancing. - Evening: - Wedding ceremony at a beautifully decorated riverside or temple venue. - Vows and rituals by the Ganges River. - Night: - Grand wedding reception with a sumptuous dinner. - Live music or DJ to keep the guests entertained.

rishikesh.title: Post-Wedding Celebrations
rishikesh.description: - Morning: - Late breakfast or brunch at the hotel. - Relaxation and leisure time for guests. - Afternoon: - Adventure activities or group outings (e.g., white-water rafting, trekking, or yoga sessions by the river) for the guests who want to explore the natural beauty of Rishikesh. - Evening: - Cocktail party or a bonfire night by the riverside. - Exchange stories and enjoy the cool breeze of Rishikesh.

rishikesh.title: Farewell and Departure
rishikesh.description: - Morning: - Farewell breakfast at the hotel or a scenic breakfast setup. - Thank-you ceremony for guests, acknowledging their presence and support. - Afternoon: - Check-out from the hotel and departure for the airport or railway station.

jaipur.title: Arrival and Welcome Dinner
jaipur.description: - Morning/Afternoon: Arrival at Jaipur International Airport. You and your guests will be greeted by wedding organizers and transported to your chosen accommodations. - Evening: Welcome dinner at a traditional Rajasthani restaurant or at the wedding venue. Enjoy local cuisine, music, and dance performances.

jaipur.title: Mehndi and Sangeet Ceremony
jaipur.description: - Morning: Breakfast at the hotel/resort. - Afternoon: Mehndi ceremony for the bride and guests at a beautiful outdoor location. - Evening: Sangeet ceremony with live music and dance performances. It's a night of celebration and dancing to Bollywood tunes.

jaipur.title: Wedding Day
jaipur.description: - Morning: Breakfast at the hotel/resort. - Afternoon: Wedding ceremony at a stunning Jaipur palace or a scenic garden venue. - Evening: Grand reception with dinner, cocktails, and entertainment. It's a night of celebrations and speeches.

jaipur.title: Post-Wedding Brunch and Departure
jaipur.description: - Morning: Farewell brunch to thank your guests for attending and to share memories. - Afternoon: Check-out from the hotel/resort and departure for the airport.

georgia.title: Arrival and Welcome Dinner
georgia.description: Morning: - Arrive at your chosen airport in Georgia (e.g., Atlanta Hartsfield-Jackson International Airport). - Transfer to your accommodation, which could be a charming inn, a luxury hotel, or a rental property, depending on your preferences and budget. Afternoon: - Check-in and freshen up. - Explore the local area or relax by the hotel pool. Evening: - Welcome dinner for your guests at a local restaurant or a private event space. - Toast to the beginning of your wedding celebrations.

georgia.title: Wedding Ceremony
georgia.description: Morning: - Enjoy a leisurely breakfast at your accommodation. - If you're getting ready at a different location, make arrangements for hair and makeup. Afternoon: - Wedding ceremony at your chosen venue, whether it's a vineyard, historic estate, beach, or any other scenic spot. - Cocktail hour and group photos following the ceremony. Evening: - Reception and dinner with live music or DJ entertainment. - Dancing and celebrating with family and friends.

georgia.title: Exploring Georgia
georgia.description: Morning: - Brunch with close family and friends at the accommodation or a local restaurant. Afternoon: - Guided tour or excursion to explore the local attractions, such as visiting nearby wineries, historic sites, or natural parks. Evening: - Rehearsal dinner at a local restaurant or venue. - Spend quality time with your wedding party and close family members.

georgia.title: Farewell Brunch and Departure
georgia.description: Morning: - Farewell brunch with all your wedding guests. - Thank everyone for joining you in celebrating your special day. Afternoon: - Check out of your accommodation. - Depending on your flight schedule, you may have some free time for last-minute shopping or relaxation. Evening: - Depart for the airport for your journey back home or continue your honeymoon in Georgia.

mauritius.title: Arrival in Mauritius
mauritius.description: - Morning: - Arrive at Sir Seewoosagur Ramgoolam International Airport (MRU). - Meet your wedding planner or coordinator. - Transfer to your chosen accommodation (resort, hotel, or villa). - Afternoon: - Check-in and freshen up. - Explore the resort or relax on the beach. - Evening: - Welcome dinner or cocktail party at the resort. - Enjoy a beautiful sunset view.

mauritius.title: Wedding Day
mauritius.description: - Morning: - Breakfast at the resort. - Spa and beauty treatments for the bride and bridesmaids. - Afternoon: - Groom and groomsmen preparations. - Wedding ceremony at a scenic beachfront location or garden. - Reception and celebration immediately following the ceremony. - Evening: - Dinner and dancing under the stars.

mauritius.title: Post-Wedding Activities
mauritius.description: - Morning: - Leisurely breakfast. - Optional group activities like snorkeling, scuba diving, or boat trips. - Afternoon: - Enjoy some water sports or explore local attractions like Chamarel Seven Colored Earths or the Black River Gorges National Park. - Evening: - Romantic beachside dinner for the newlyweds. - Bonfire or beach party for all guests.

mauritius.title: Departure
mauritius.description: - Morning: - Final breakfast at the resort. - Free time for last-minute shopping or relaxation. - Afternoon: - Check out of the resort. - Transfer to the airport for your departure.

dubai.title: Arrival in Dubai
dubai.description: Morning: - Arrive at Dubai International Airport. - Transfer to your chosen hotel or resort. - Check-in and freshen up. Afternoon: - Welcome lunch or afternoon tea at the hotel. - Relax and unwind by the pool or beach. - Spa treatments for the bridal party (optional). Evening: - Welcome dinner at a fine-dining restaurant or a private reception at the hotel. - Toast to the beginning of your wedding festivities.

dubai.title: Pre-Wedding Activities
dubai.description: Morning: - Breakfast at the hotel. - Bride and groom preparations for the big day. - Bridal party's hair and makeup appointments. Afternoon: - Wedding ceremony rehearsal. - Explore Dubai for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Evening: - Rehearsal dinner or a casual gathering with friends and family. - Enjoy a laid-back evening to relieve pre-wedding jitters.

dubai.title: Wedding Day
dubai.description: Morning: - Start the day with a leisurely breakfast. - Hair and makeup sessions for the bride and bridesmaids. - Groom and groomsmen get ready. Afternoon: - Exchange vows at your chosen wedding venue. Popular options include beachfront settings, desert oases, or luxury resorts. - Post-ceremony cocktail hour with canapés. - Group photos and couple's photoshoot. Evening: - Grand wedding reception with dinner and entertainment. - Cutting the cake, speeches, and dancing the night away. - Fireworks or a light show to cap off the evening.

dubai.title: Post-Wedding Celebrations and Farewell
dubai.description: Morning: - Late breakfast or brunch with your guests. - Share memories and stories from the wedding day. Afternoon: - Optional activities for guests, such as a desert safari, city tour, or spa day. - Relax by the hotel's pool or beach. Evening: - Farewell dinner or cocktail reception. - Thank your guests for joining you on this special journey.

dubai.title: Departure
dubai.description: Morning: - Breakfast at the hotel. - Check-out and arrange airport transfers. - Bid farewell to Dubai and your guests.

sri-lanka.title: Arrival and Welcome Dinner
sri-lanka.description: Morning: - Arrive at Bandaranaike International Airport in Colombo. - Transfer to your chosen wedding venue or hotel in Negombo or Colombo, which are close to the airport. - Check-in and freshen up. Afternoon: - Relax and unwind by the pool or beach. - Optional spa treatments for the bride and groom to relax before the big day. - Wedding party preparations and rehearsals. Evening: - Welcome dinner for all guests at the hotel or a nearby restaurant. - Enjoy a traditional Sri Lankan buffet and cultural performances. - Toast to the beginning of your wedding festivities.

sri-lanka.title: Wedding Day
sri-lanka.description: Morning: - Breakfast at the hotel. - Hair and makeup sessions for the bride and bridal party. - Groom and groomsmen get ready. - Wedding preparations and final touches. Afternoon: - Wedding ceremony at a picturesque location, such as a beach, garden, or a historic site. - Exchange vows in a beautiful outdoor setting. - Group photos and couple's photoshoot. Evening: - Cocktail hour with drinks and canapés. - Sunset reception with a sumptuous dinner, featuring Sri Lankan and international cuisine. - Dancing and entertainment, including a DJ or live band. - Cutting the wedding cake and toasts.

sri-lanka.title: Post-Wedding Celebration
sri-lanka.description: Morning: - Late breakfast for everyone to recover from the previous night's festivities. - Relax by the pool, beach, or at the spa. - Optional group activities or excursions for guests who want to explore Sri Lanka's culture, wildlife, or scenic beauty. Afternoon: - Light lunch for all guests. - More relaxation and leisure time. - Last-minute wedding memories with friends and family. Evening: - Farewell dinner with a traditional Sri Lankan BBQ or seafood feast. - Share your gratitude with your guests for being part of your special day.

sri-lanka.title: Departure
sri-lanka.description: Morning: - Breakfast at the hotel. - Check-out and farewells to your guests. - Transfer to the airport for your onward journey or honeymoon.

vietnam.title: Arrival in Vietnam
vietnam.description: - Morning: - Arrive at Tan Son Nhat International Airport in Ho Chi Minh City (Saigon). - Transfer to your chosen hotel or resort in the city. - Afternoon: - Check-in and freshen up at the hotel. - Spend some leisure time exploring the vibrant streets of Saigon. - Evening: - Welcome dinner at a local Vietnamese restaurant, where you can enjoy traditional cuisine.

vietnam.title: Wedding Ceremony
vietnam.description: - Morning: - Relax and prepare for your wedding ceremony. - Wedding ceremony and reception at your chosen wedding venue. Popular options include beachfront resorts in places like Nha Trang or Da Nang, or a picturesque venue in Hoi An. - Afternoon: - Photography session at iconic locations or scenic spots. - Evening: - Wedding reception with a banquet and dancing under the stars.

vietnam.title: Explore Vietnam
vietnam.description: - Morning: - Breakfast at the hotel. - Depending on your location, consider exploring the local culture and attractions. For example: - In Hoi An, you can explore the charming ancient town with its historic buildings and lantern-lit streets. - In Nha Trang, you can relax on the beach or go snorkeling. - In Da Nang, visit the Marble Mountains or explore the nearby ancient town of Hoi An. - Afternoon: - Enjoy a spa day or relaxation at the hotel or resort. - If you're in a coastal location, consider water activities like paddleboarding, jet-skiing, or a boat tour. - Evening: - Farewell dinner at a rooftop restaurant or a special event at your resort.

vietnam.title: Departure
vietnam.description: - Morning: - Check out of your hotel. - Depending on your flight schedule, you may have some free time for last-minute shopping or exploration. - Afternoon: - Transfer to the airport for your departure.

italy.title: Arrival in Italy - Welcome Dinner
italy.description: Morning: - Arrive at your chosen Italian destination. - Check into your selected accommodation. Afternoon: - Get settled in and freshen up. Evening: - Welcome dinner for all guests at a local Italian restaurant. - Toast to the beginning of your wedding celebration.

italy.title: Pre-Wedding Excursion and Rehearsal Dinner
italy.description: Morning: - Breakfast at your accommodation. - Relax and prepare for the day ahead. Afternoon: - Guided tour or group excursion to a local attraction (e.g., historical site, winery tour, or cultural activity). Alternatively, you can spend this time separately with your bridal party for pre-wedding preparations. - Lunch on your own or in small groups. Late Afternoon: - Return to your accommodation to prepare for the evening. Evening: - Rehearsal for the wedding ceremony. - Rehearsal dinner at a charming Italian restaurant or a private venue. - Thank your wedding party and guests for their support.

italy.title: Wedding Day
italy.description: Morning: - Breakfast in your accommodation. - Begin hair and makeup preparations for the bride and bridal party. Late Morning: - Groom and groomsmen prepare. Early Afternoon: - Guests have free time to relax or explore the local area. Late Afternoon: - Wedding ceremony at your chosen wedding venue. - Cocktail hour with drinks and appetizers. Evening: - Reception dinner with dancing and celebrations. - Cake cutting and toasts.

italy.title: Post-Wedding Brunch and Farewell
italy.description: Morning: - Farewell brunch for all guests at a scenic location or your accommodation. Afternoon: - Optional group activities or free time for guests to explore independently. - Packing and preparations for departure. Evening: - Departure for those not staying longer.

bali.title: Arrival and Welcome Dinner
bali.description: Morning: - Arrive at Ngurah Rai International Airport in Bali. - Meet with your wedding planner and venue coordinator to go over final details. Afternoon: - Check-in at your chosen accommodation, whether it's a luxury resort or a private villa. - Relax and freshen up after your journey. Evening: - Welcome dinner at a beachfront restaurant with traditional Balinese cuisine. - Guests can mingle and get to know each other in a relaxed atmosphere.

bali.title: Wedding Day
bali.description: Morning: - Breakfast at the hotel or villa. - Bridal party and groomsmen preparations. - Hair and makeup for the bride and bridesmaids. Afternoon: - Wedding ceremony at a beautiful beachfront venue or a lush garden setting. - Cocktail hour with canapés and drinks. - Professional photography session. Evening: - Reception dinner with live music or a DJ. - First dance, speeches, and cutting of the wedding cake. - Dancing and celebration with family and friends.

bali.title: Relaxation and Exploration
bali.description: Morning: - Late breakfast or brunch at the hotel or villa. - Relax by the pool or on the beach. - Spa treatments or massages for the couple and guests. Afternoon: - Optional group excursion for guests, such as a visit to a nearby temple, a cultural show, or a water sports activity. Evening: - Sunset cocktails and dinner at a cliffside restaurant with stunning views. - Private fire dance performance or other cultural entertainment.

bali.title: Farewell Brunch and Departure
bali.description: Morning: - Farewell brunch at the accommodation or a nearby restaurant. - Thank your guests for joining you on this special journey. Afternoon: - Guests can relax by the pool, enjoy the beach, or do some last-minute souvenir shopping. Evening: - Check-out from the hotel or villa. - Depart for Ngurah Rai International Airport for your onward journey or honeymoon.

phuket.title: Arrival in Phuket
phuket.description: - Morning: - Arrive at Phuket International Airport. - Meet and greet by wedding organizers or hotel staff. - Afternoon: - Check-in at your chosen hotel or resort. - Spend some relaxing time by the pool or beach. - Evening: - Welcome dinner or cocktail party at the hotel or a nearby beachfront venue. - Enjoy a Thai cultural performance or fire show.

phuket.title: Wedding Ceremony
phuket.description: - Morning: - Breakfast at the hotel. - Spa and grooming appointments for the bride and groom. - Afternoon: - Pre-wedding photoshoot at a scenic location in Phuket (e.g., a beach, temple, or lush garden). - Evening: - Wedding ceremony at a picturesque venue (beachfront, garden, or resort). - Reception dinner with a Thai and international menu. - Dancing and entertainment (live band or DJ).

phuket.title: Relaxation and Excursion
phuket.description: - Morning: - Leisurely breakfast. - Relax by the pool or indulge in spa treatments. - Afternoon: - Group excursion or optional activities for guests (options may include island hopping, snorkeling, or a visit to Phang Nga Bay). - Evening: - Farewell dinner with traditional Thai cuisine. - Speeches, toasts, and dancing to celebrate the wedding.

phuket.title: Departure
phuket.description: - Morning: - Breakfast and check-out from the hotel. - Transfer to Phuket International Airport. - Afternoon: - Departure for your home country.
